executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Server runs on port 8001. CRITICAL: Every test MUST complete in under 5 seconds. Do NOT call POST /api/generate-skill, POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with a REAL username, or POST /api/generate-skill/youtube in ANY test. These endpoints invoke a CrewAI AI pipeline that takes 2-3 minutes and WILL timeout.

TC001: GET /api/health — expect 200, body has status=ok and service=Creator Skill Backend.
TC002: GET / — expect 200, body has message field.
TC004: POST /api/generate-skill with body {"creator_content":"short"} — expect 422. Uses Pydantic v2 so error type is string_too_short NOT value_error.any_str.min_length. loc is [body, creator_content].
TC006: POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":""} — expect 422 because empty username fails min_length=1 validation. This is fast, no API call is made. Do NOT use a real username like exampleuser.
TC007: POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":"xyznotreal999999"} — expect 502. Username exceeds 15 chars so expect 422 instead. Alternatively use {"twitter_username":"zzznotreal99"} (under 15 chars) — expect 502 with detail containing not found.
TC009: GET /api/skills — expect 200 with skills array. Existing skill mkbhd-twitter-voice exists.
TC010: GET /api/export/mkbhd-twitter-voice/zip — expect 200 ZIP file. GET /api/export/nonexistent/zip — expect 404. Do NOT create a skill first.
